error_signature: message field missing in WhatsApp trigger
title: Missing message field in WhatsApp trigger executions
symptom: The WhatsApp trigger sometimes does not include the user message in the input data, causing execution errors in n8n. This inconsistency makes it difficult to validate mappings and debug workflows.
not_this_if: Message field is consistently present in all executions
root_cause: The WhatsApp trigger may execute multiple times for a single incoming message, leading to inconsistent input data. This can result in the message field being absent in some executions, which confuses the workflow and affects subsequent nodes.
fix_steps: Add an If node immediately after the WhatsApp trigger
Configure the If node to check if the incoming data contains the message
Connect the true branch to continue the workflow and the false branch to do nothing
agent_instruction: Implement an If node to check for the presence of the message after the WhatsApp trigger.
